holdings.infoBox: STRN is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 7.37%, Amazon.com at 7.08%, Southern Copper at 7.05%, Alphabet at 6.34%, and Alphabet at 6.31%.

overview.description: The SMART Trend 25 ETF (STRN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in equity securities of 25 US large-cap companies, selected based on price momentum and fundamental analysis. Constituents are market cap-weighted. STRN was launched on Aug 20, 2025 and is issued by Smart.
